title: Medium Voltage Underground Feeder Replacement at Civic Center
description: Replace aging medium voltage underground cable feeders, furnish conduit, pull boxes, cable terminations, trenching, testing, and commissioning. Bid bond and performance bond required. Submit sealed bids through the city procurement portal by June 18, 2026.

title: Hyperscale AI Data Center Critical Power Distribution Phase 2
description: Furnish and install medium voltage cable, switchgear, transformers, fiber controls, duct bank, UPS distribution, busduct, and utility interconnection equipment for a hyperscale AI infrastructure data center campus supporting GPU compute halls. Requires supply and installation coordination, insurance certificates, and manufacturer cut sheets. Estimated value exceeds $18,000,000.

title: Wildfire Fire Damage Rebuild for Distribution Pole Line
agency: California Department of Forestry and Fire Protection
description: Emergency repair and rebuild of burned overhead distribution pole line, replacement conductors, crossarms, transformers, and fiber communications. Contractor must provide payment bond, performance bond, traffic control, and weekend outage support.

title: Substation Transformer Replacement and Relay Upgrades
description: Replace 138kV transformer, install substation steel, breaker controls, relay panels, fiber, grounding, testing, commissioning, and energization support. Insurance and bonding are mandatory.

title: Overhead Pole Line Hardening for Rural Feeder
description: Overhead pole replacement, reconductoring, recloser installation, transformer replacement, and distribution feeder hardening. Submission instructions require pricing schedule, safety plan, and bid bond.

title: Airport Terminal Conduit and Fiber Backbone Expansion
description: Install conduit, fiber backbone, pull boxes, data center room terminations, testing, and labeling for airport terminal network expansion. Includes night work, insurance requirements, and portal submission.

title: Municipal Water Plant Electrical Distribution Upgrade
description: General electrical replacement for plant distribution panels, underground conduit, medium voltage cable, transformers, generator connections, and commissioning. Requires insurance, bid form, and performance bond.

title: State University Underground Duct Bank and Cable Installation
description: Construct underground duct bank, trenching, medium voltage cable pulling, splicing, terminations, manholes, and site restoration. Submit proposal, schedule, safety plan, insurance certificate, and bid bond.

title: Transmission Line Fiber and Shield Wire Replacement
description: Replace transmission shield wire with fiber optic ground wire, install splice boxes, perform high voltage safety planning, outage coordination, testing, and closeout documentation.

title: Emergency Repair of Flood-Damaged Underground Electrical Service
description: Emergency repair and replacement of flood-damaged underground cable, conduit, transformers, and service entrance equipment at county facilities. Requires rapid mobilization, insurance, bonding, and email submission.
